text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The grocery store's having a HUGE sale!
I'd be a fool to miss out on all these DEALS!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Sounds like you could use a hand!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You sure? We're talking full-blown
supermarket war here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that's exactly what I want to hear!
Just leave all the bag-carrying to me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Reliable as always, I see!
Well, I'll take you up on that offer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see how well
you perform in battle!
